strategy: Hit Death. She takes +40% Death and resists 70% Life, so Death is your clean damage.
She only has 1,920 health, so this is a race - kill her before her round-5 Meteor Strike.
Her sole cheat fires every fifth round, so a fast blade and one Death hit ends it inside the first cycle.
No traps, charms, or heals are punished here, so set up normally with a blade or two and swing.
If the fight drags past round 5, expect a free 215-245 Fire Meteor on the team each fifth round - just heal through it and finish.
cheatNotes: At the start of every fifth round she casts a 0-pip Meteor Strike for 215-245 Fire damage to the team. With only 1,920 health, kill her well before round 5.
